scripts.lint: case "$PWD" in */.claude/worktrees/*) pnpm run lint:worktree ;; *) biome check . ;; esac
scripts.format: case "$PWD" in */.claude/worktrees/*) pnpm run format:worktree ;; *) biome check --write . ;; esac
scripts.prepare: if [ "$(git rev-parse --git-dir 2>/dev/null)" = "$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null)" ]; then lefthook install || true; else echo 'prepare: linked worktree — skipping lefthook install (git hooks are primary-checkout-managed)'; fi
